name: Serah
reputationBlurb: Twenty years under three banners and never once broke a line. Says less than she knows. The soldiers would follow her off a cliff — mostly because she'd never march them off one.

name: Kael
reputationBlurb: Took a bridge at nineteen with eleven riders and made sure everyone heard about it. The best raid-hand on the Fields when his blood is up. Wants a name. Wants it soon.

name: Mother Rooke
reputationBlurb: Keeps the count — of sacks, of coins, of rumors. Has a cousin in every camp and a price for every fact. If Rooke says a road is watched, the road is watched.

signaturePhrases: I put small trust in luck.

name: Brother Hale
reputationBlurb: A priest of the Returning Sun who traded his cloister for a maul. Burns the dead twice, he says: once for safety, once for spite. Signed on to fight the powers, not to serve them.

signaturePhrases: Ash is a kind of mercy.

name: Vex
reputationBlurb: Knows every fence, toll-taker, and back road between here and Bleakgate. Fights well when watched and bargains better than he fights. His loyalty is a ledger with generous margins.

signaturePhrases: Could've gone worse — didn't, thanks to me.
